name: Almighty Imperial Gangsters
description: The Almighty Imperial Gangsters are a Latino (Puerto Rican) Folk Nation street gang founded in 1970 in Logan Square, Chicago. Originally called 'Imperial Spanish Gangsters,' started by Carlos 'Mexico' Quintanilla who merged with the 'Mighty Grand' crew (Greek, Norwegian, Polish and Ukrainian kids fighting Italian gangs). Colors of black and pink adopted in 1975 after Latin Kings shot and killed 17-year-old female member Nora 'Morena' Salazar. Part of the United Latino Organization (1978-1992). Their rounded crown symbol comes from the Imperial Margarine brand. Territory in Logan Square, Hermosa, Belmont-Cragin, and Franklin Park suburb ('The Jungle').

sources.title: Almighty Imperial Gangsters — Chicago Gang History
